reviews.review_description: Your mods are racist and sexual to younger kids by taking their mod stick and being really inappropriate with it your mods have done it to younger boys and worst of all younger girls most of your mods are 15, 16, or 17 and I’m sure you probably have one that’s 18. Your finger painters aren’t that bad but they aren’t really good either. Your finger painters are racist, sexist, sexual to younger kids, and also have a habit of saying put it on your mom or talking about peoples moms. Anyway remember when I said these guys are like 16, 17 well yea they don’t really act like it they act like immature little kids. Your moderation team is discusting and nasty it’s sickening to listen to. One even went as far to say they would r#pe my dog if it didn’t stop barking. find some new mods and take away peoples finger painters if you’re fine with this type of behavior go get some help. I literally walked in on a maroon moderator taking his stick and acting like he was fing a 12 year old. Yes the kid was 12 and  the kid was a girl the moderator was a 16, 17 and a boy. That is disgusting and something needs to be done about this now
Love this game sm gives you alot of shiny rocks which makes all cosmetics basically free met a mod immediately when i first started in original tag 2
Colls is sigma to give me finger painter and this game is so fun to play and I had fp sense may 12 colls has +1,0000000 aura btw im frost vr
goated ahh game, no other words, period.

Hey regional tag I joined Discord but I never seem to get my stick and finger painter. That’s OK but I’m just writing this review because of this also I love the game. It’s so fun everyone’s favorite. Keep up the good work and you’ll always do your best. 😉❤️
